title: Designing a Cybersecurity Framework
scenario: Create a cybersecurity framework for a large enterprise with a set of 20 critical assets. The framework should include a set of security controls and incident response procedures. Use a risk-based approach and include specific features such as vulnerability scanning and penetration testing.
constraints: Must include a minimum of 20 security controls

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the generated framework accurately assesses the risk of each critical asset.
Check if the generated framework includes effective security controls.
Assess the incident response procedures included in the generated framework.
